name: com.creativearcana.audio
description: A Unity audio management package for playing, controlling, fading, pooling, mixing, and ducking audio using Unity's built-in audio system.

samples.description: Example scene demonstrating all AudioChannel types, multiple audio PlayMode options, an AudioSettingPanel for adjusting and saving AudioMixer channel volumes, and scene reload support for testing persistent audio playback. Requires TextMeshPro.
